ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: comedie faite a la mode des anciens comiques, premierement composee en langue Tuscane, pa les professeurs de l`Academie Senoise, et nommee Intronati, depuys traduite en Francoys par Charles Estienne, et nouvellement reveve et corrigee
ItacWorkItem.Notes: On this book, and in particular on the introductory essay, see Bernard Weinberg, `Charles Estienne and Jean de la Taille`, Modern Language Notes, 61 (Apr., 1946), 262-65. More recent and more complete, is Cerreta, `A French translation of Gl` Ingannati: C. Estienne`s les Abusez`, in Italica (1977), pp. 12-34. This text was translated into English, see Laelia. A comedy Acted at Queen`s College, Cambridge on 1st of March 1595, ed. and intro. G. C. Moore Smith (Cambridge, 1910)

Essay.EssayTitle: Epistre du traducteur a monseigneur le Dauphin de France declarative de la maniere que tenoient les anciens, tant a la composition du Ieu, qu` a la pareil de leurs Comedies.

ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
